definitions.text: innleder en leddsetning som uttrykker at noe skjer umiddelbart etter noe annet
definitions.translation: introduces a subordinate clause expressing that something happens immediately after something else

examples.no: hun sovnet så snart hun la hodet på puta
examples.en: she fell asleep as soon as she put her head on the pillow

examples.no: så snart det ikke regnet lenger, løp de ut
examples.en: as soon as it stopped raining, they ran outside
